nodes.label: Ticking Clocks and Turning Calendar
nodes.description: Reading time on clocks and dates on calendars

nodes.label: Reading a Clock
nodes.description: Using the hour hand and minute hand to tell time

nodes.label: Hour Hand (Short)
nodes.description: The short hand shows the hour; moves slowly

nodes.label: Minute Hand (Long)
nodes.description: The long hand shows minutes; each number = 5 minutes

nodes.label: Special Times
nodes.description: O'clock, quarter past, half past, quarter to

nodes.label: O'clock & Half Past
nodes.description: O'clock = minute hand on 12; half past = minute hand on 6

nodes.label: Quarter Past & To
nodes.description: Quarter past = 15 min (hand on 3); quarter to = 45 min (hand on 9)

nodes.label: AM and PM
nodes.description: AM = midnight to noon; PM = noon to midnight

nodes.label: 24 Hours in a Day
nodes.description: 12 hours AM + 12 hours PM = 24 hours total

nodes.label: Elapsed Time
nodes.description: Time passed from start to end; count hours and minutes

nodes.label: Reading a Calendar
nodes.description: Days, weeks, months, and years on a calendar

nodes.label: Days and Weeks
nodes.description: 7 days in a week; Monday to Sunday

nodes.label: Months and Year
nodes.description: 12 months in a year; 365 days (366 in leap year)

nodes.label: Scheduling and Planning
nodes.description: Using time and calendar to plan daily activities

nodes.label: Daily Schedule
nodes.description: Planning activities like school, homework, play using time

nodes.label: Dates and Events
nodes.description: Finding what day a date falls on; planning for holidays and festivals
